Transforming Data into Insightful Stories

Aspiring Data Analyst passionate about transforming data into engaging experiences and actionable insights.

View My Work Download Resume Contact Me

About Me

Aspiring Data Analyst with a solid foundation in Power BI, Excel, and Python, eager to leverage data visualization, automation, and reporting skills to support data-driven decision-making. Skilled in designing interactive dashboards, performing data cleaning and transformation, and creating insightful visual reports that communicate complex information clearly. Familiar with KNIME, Power Automate, and Azure, with a passion for streamlining workflows, integrating data from multiple sources, and optimizing business processes. Adept at identifying trends, uncovering actionable insights, and presenting findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Committed to continuous learning, staying updated on emerging analytics tools, and thriving in collaborative, results-oriented environments.

Education

B.E. Computer Science and Engineering

KGiSL Institute of Technology (Graduation: 2026)

Skills

Services

Data Analytics

Transforming raw data into actionable insights through in-depth analysis, statistical modeling, and predictive analytics to drive informed decision-making.

Web Development

Building responsive and user-friendly web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies to create engaging digital experiences.

Projects / Portfolio

Car Theft Analysis

Tools: Excel

An interactive dashboard built using Excel with pivot tables, charts, and slicers to visualize car theft trends. It helps identify patterns, hotspots, and time-based variations in theft incidents. By leveraging clean and well-structured data, the dashboard delivers actionable insights, enabling stakeholders to make informed decisions and implement preventive measures effectively.

View Download

Blinkit Sales Dashboard

Tools: Power BI & SQL

An interactive dashboard developed in Power BI using SQL-preprocessed data to analyze Blinkit’s sales and operations. It visualizes sales performance, order trends, and operational efficiency, helping identify high-performing products, seasonal demand patterns, and areas for process improvement. With clean, structured datasets, this dashboard empowers stakeholders with actionable insights for data-driven decision-making and strategic planning.

View Download

Electric Vehicle Dashboard

Tools: Tableau

A Tableau-based dashboard designed to analyze the electric vehicle market by visualizing adoption rates, performance metrics, and market trends. It highlights growth patterns, geographical distribution, and usage insights through interactive charts and filters. By leveraging clean and preprocessed data, the dashboard equips stakeholders with valuable information to track industry progress, identify opportunities, and support informed decision-making in the EV sector.

View Download

"A developer isn't just someone who writes code — they are builders of digital worlds, architects of logic, and problem solvers at heart. Each line of code tells a story of curiosity, persistence, and creativity. Whether it's debugging late at night or deploying at sunrise, developers bring ideas to life one function at a time."
